scripts.copy-bootstrap-icons: mkdir -p public/assets/css/vendor/fonts && cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/* public/assets/css/vendor/fonts/ && cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/bootstrap-icons.css public/assets/css/vendor/
scripts.copy-datatables: mkdir -p public/assets/js/vendor && cp node_modules/datatables.net-bs5/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js public/assets/js/vendor/datatables.bootstrap5.min.js && cp node_modules/datatables.net/js/dataTables.min.js public/assets/js/vendor/datatables.min.js && mkdir -p public/assets/css/vendor && cp node_modules/datatables.net-bs5/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css public/assets/css/vendor/datatables.bootstrap5.min.css
